title: Paper pop-up card with pink pram, birthday card for baby, baby shower, G 13.3
features: Special gift: this special card with an elegant pop-up pink pram in the middle is sure to touch all parents. Whether used as a baby card, baby shower gift or thank you card, this card is perfect for the birth of a baby girl. Make someone feel very special with this gift card.

Gift a smile: this miniature pram pops out when you open the card and makes a smile appear on any face. These little works of art are created by us with love and a lot of skill, which together create the great surprise inside.

Versatile - you can use the card on many occasions, as we make the cards very elegantly and they are of high-quality. -When closed, the card measures 15 cm x 15 cm. Inside, the card is blank and you have enough space for your message. Then simply insert the card into the envelope and the gift is ready.
Fair trade and quality, the cards are produced under fair conditions in a family business. Support this project with your purchase. The items are cut out with a laser and then put together by hand.
-We already have more than 20,000 satisfied customers, so persuade yours about our lovely products. More questions? -
description: Product Description Pop-up cards for any occasion or just because. These folding cards offer you an extensive selection of lovingly handmade 3D cards and designs. Whether for a birthday or special day, wedding or anniversary, birth or communion, Easter or Christmas, with our pop-up cards we help you to provide a surprise for any occasion. Put a smile on the recipient's face and create unforgettable moments of joy. Our folding cards are suitable for posting or as an addition to a gift. 3D pop-up cards by Artis Design GmbH, perfect greeting cards, greeting cards or as gift voucher or money gift packaging.
